turns.content:
How do I use the Anthropic Messages API to stream back the model's
chain-of-thought reasoning tokens in real time? I want to see the
internal thinking as separate events in the stream, like
`reasoning_content` blocks alongside the normal `content_block_delta`
events. What's the parameter I pass to enable that?

params.args: How do I use the Anthropic Messages API to stream back the model's chain-of-thought reasoning tokens in real time? I want to see the internal thinking as separate events in the stream, like reasoning_content blocks alongside the normal content_block_delta events. What's the parameter I pass to enable that?
